{{Quote|Don't ask questions, your Highness! Just grab a blaster and join in!|Han Solo|<ref name="SW95" />}}
The '''Battle of Kabray''' was a skirmish in the [[Nagai–Tof War|Nagai invasion]] of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Background==
{{Quote|You are to go and enjoy yourselves and by both word and example, to do all you can to lay their fears to rest.|Admiral Ackbar briefs Princess Leia Organa|<ref name="SW95" />}}
After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and the formation of the [[Alliance of Free Planets]], certain members began to grumble about the manner in which the leadership of the Alliance was run, claiming it was too oppressive. The leaders of the discontent parties gathered on [[Kabray]] to share their concerns with one another. Most attending the gathering were non-military members of the Alliance, and had contributed little to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion's]] fight against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] dispatched [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], along with four [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltrons]] as an escort, to the gathering to listen to their concerns and show them the leadership was not aloof, not deaf to their concerns.

The [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] leadership targeted this gathering as an opportunity to disrupt the Alliance's diplomatic base and dispatched 13 Nagai warriors, led by [[Ozrei N'takkilomandrife|Knife]], to round up the non-combatants.

===The battle===
{{Quote|It's a pleasure to welcome you to our distinguished band of prisoners!|A Nagai warrior to Han Solo|<ref name="SW95" />}}
The Nagai arrived before the Alliance reps and easily captured the party of diplomats. When Leia and Han finally arrived they walked right into a trap and were captured without a fight. The 6 captives were disarmed and sealed with a room.

While Han and Leia tried to formulate a plan involving Leia pretending to faint, the Zeltron boys set their own trap. They hoisted [[Jahn]] up to the ceiling where he wedged himself in the corner above the door. When a Nagai guard entered the room, he jumped on him, knocking him to the ground.

The remaining Zeltrons rushed out of the cell and attacked the remaining Nagai in a fierce brawl. Han and Leia appropriated [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] from downed Nagai and joined in on the fighting. Eventually, the Nagai were all rounded up and captured by the Alliance team.

===Aftermath===
[[File:Free_Planets_reps.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The dissenting Alliance reps are placated by Han and Leia]]
{{Quote|Everyone knows the Alliance of Free Planets looks after…all its loyal members.|Leia Organa to the Alliance representatives|<ref name="SW95" />}}
While a strategic victory for the Nagai was averted, the skirmish on Kabray also had positive repercussions for the Alliance. Those grumbling member worlds realized the importance of a strong military within the Alliance and were placated by the decisive actions of the Alliance leadership.

Word of this defeat would make it back to the Nagai leaders on [[Kinooine/Legends|Kinooine]], [[Den Siva]] and [[Lumiya]], who would later decide to invade [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]] to neutralize the threat the Zeltrons presented.
